languages.text: "Какие могут быть раздумья, эттфатер? Ксеносы — враги Всеотца, и нам должно принести им истребление. Из-за чего бы не родилась их схватка — мы не знаем, не станет ли победитель лишь сильнее. Обрушимся же на них со всей яростью!"

"What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"
languages.original_text: "Какие могут быть раздумья, эттфатер? Ксеносы — враги Всеотца, и нам должно принести им истребление. Из-за чего бы не родилась их схватка — мы не знаем, не станет ли победитель лишь сильнее. Обрушимся же на них со всей яростью!"

traits.locale_text: "What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"

"What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"

"What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"

languages.text: 「何を考えねばならぬ、エーテル・ヴァター？ ゼノスはオールファザーの敵であり、我々は彼らに滅亡をもたらさねばならぬ。この戦いの果実を結んだ木は、勝利者のみがその後強大になるのかどうかは知る由もない。我々は全力を尽くして彼らに襲いかかりましょう！」
languages.original_text: "What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"

traits.locale_text: 「何を考えねばならぬ、エーテル・ヴァター？ ゼノスはオールファザーの敵であり、我々は彼らに滅亡をもたらさねばならぬ。この戦いの果実を結んだ木は、勝利者のみがその後強大になるのかどうかは知る由もない。我々は全力を尽くして彼らに襲いかかりましょう！」

languages.text: «¿En qué necesita pensar, Aett-Vater? Los xenos son enemigos del Padre de todas las cosas y debemos aniquilarlos. Sea cual sea el fruto de la batalla, no podemos saber si el vencedor se volverá más poderoso. ¡Hagamos caer sobre ellos todo el peso de nuestra furia!».
languages.original_text: "What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"

traits.locale_text: «¿En qué necesita pensar, Aett-Vater? Los xenos son enemigos del Padre de todas las cosas y debemos aniquilarlos. Sea cual sea el fruto de la batalla, no podemos saber si el vencedor se volverá más poderoso. ¡Hagamos caer sobre ellos todo el peso de nuestra furia!».

languages.text: “还有什么好想的，狼领？异形皆是全父之敌，必须赶尽杀绝。管它们谁输谁赢，活下来的那个日后恐怕只会更强。我们当以雷霆之怒灭绝它们！”
languages.original_text: "What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"

traits.locale_text: “还有什么好想的，狼领？异形皆是全父之敌，必须赶尽杀绝。管它们谁输谁赢，活下来的那个日后恐怕只会更强。我们当以雷霆之怒灭绝它们！”

languages.text: "Was gibt es da zu denken, Aett-Vater? Xenos sind die Feinde des Allvaters, die es auszulöschen gilt. Egal, welcher Baum die Frucht dieses Kampfes trug, wir wissen nicht, ob der Sieger gestärkt daraus hervorgehen wird. Stürzen wir uns mit unserem ganzen Zorn auf sie!"
languages.original_text: "What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"

traits.locale_text: "Was gibt es da zu denken, Aett-Vater? Xenos sind die Feinde des Allvaters, die es auszulöschen gilt. Egal, welcher Baum die Frucht dieses Kampfes trug, wir wissen nicht, ob der Sieger gestärkt daraus hervorgehen wird. Stürzen wir uns mit unserem ganzen Zorn auf sie!"

languages.text: "Düşünecek ne var ki Aett-Vater? Zenolar, Yücebaba'nın düşmanıdır. Onlara mutlak yıkım getirmeliyiz. Bu savaşın meyvesini hangi ağacın verdiği önemsiz, kazananın sonrasında daha da güçlenip güçlenmeyeceğini bilmiyoruz. Tüm öfkemizle üzerlerine çullanalım!"
languages.original_text: "What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"

traits.locale_text: "Düşünecek ne var ki Aett-Vater? Zenolar, Yücebaba'nın düşmanıdır. Onlara mutlak yıkım getirmeliyiz. Bu savaşın meyvesini hangi ağacın verdiği önemsiz, kazananın sonrasında daha da güçlenip güçlenmeyeceğini bilmiyoruz. Tüm öfkemizle üzerlerine çullanalım!"

languages.text: « À quoi bon se triturer les méninges, aett-vater ? Les xénos sont les ennemis du Père de Tous et nous devons les détruire. Quelle que soit l'origine de ce conflit, il se pourrait que les vainqueurs gagnent encore en puissance. Déversons sur eux toute notre fureur ! »
languages.original_text: "What thinking is there to be done, Aett-Vater? Xenos are the foes of the Allfather, and we must deliver annihilation upon them. Whatever tree bore the fruit of this battle, we do not know if the victor will only grow stronger afterward. Let us fall upon them with all our fury!"

traits.locale_text: « À quoi bon se triturer les méninges, aett-vater ? Les xénos sont les ennemis du Père de Tous et nous devons les détruire. Quelle que soit l'origine de ce conflit, il se pourrait que les vainqueurs gagnent encore en puissance. Déversons sur eux toute notre fureur ! »
